description_long: This object is a polygonal, angular barrel or bucket with a wide, open top and a slightly tapered, irregular body. The exterior is a matte, dark olive-brown color, giving it a utilitarian and rugged appearance suitable for outdoor or industrial use. The sides are faceted rather than smoothly curved, and there are two small, blocky protrusions on opposite sides, likely serving as rudimentary handles or grips. The interior is visible from the top, showing a lighter brown base, and the object appears hollow, designed to hold or contain materials. There are no visible lids, reinforcements, or decorative markings, emphasizing its functional design. The overall construction suggests it is made from a hard, durable material such as plastic or resin, intended for practical use in urban environments.
description: A faceted, open-topped, dark olive-brown barrel or bucket with blocky side grips and a rugged, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: The front view shows the open top and the angular, faceted body with no visible handles.
description_view_1: This side view reveals a small, blocky protrusion on the right side, likely a handle or grip.
description_view_2: The rear view displays two blocky side protrusions, one on each side, and the widest part of the body.
description_view_3: This view shows a single blocky protrusion on the left side and the mostly featureless back surface.
